extract: Dipplin (Japanese: カミッチュ Kamicchu) is a dual-type Grass/Dragon Pokémon introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It evolves from Applin when exposed to a Syrupy Apple and evolves into Hydrapple when leveled up while knowing Dragon Cheer. It is one of Applin's three branched Evolutions, the others being Flapple and Appletun.
